changelog:
• Cleaned up developer warnings logs by reclassifying false app diagnostics info.
• Fixed returning black screen bugs by bypassing transition locks and key stabilization.
• Resolved Drumex sample packaging issues preventing local audio preload 404s.
• Enhanced Developer Tools with a new live Navigation Diagnostics event tracker.
• Rebranded user-facing app elements to Livex Hub.
